name: TeamCardSix
description: Team member card with full-bleed image background and blurred gradient overlay with name and role text at bottom.
details: Use for team member displays with visual impact and modern blur effect. Layout: Full Image Background with Blurred Gradient Overlay at bottom third. Image fills entire card (rounded-theme-capped). Name (2xl font-medium) and role (base size) displayed in overlay at bottom with text-foreground color. Backdrop blur effect (backdrop-blur-xl) covers bottom 1/3 with gradient mask (transparent to black 60%). Uses CardStack pattern for responsive grid or carousel layout. Automatically switches between grid (1-4 items) and carousel (5+ items) based on gridVariant. All core fields required for visual consistency. Best for team showcases, staff galleries, or about us sections where photos are prominent. Optional header with title, description, tag, and buttons.

description.example: The talented people behind our success

name.note: Team member name displayed at 2xl font-medium with truncate in blurred overlay

role.note: Role/title displayed at base size with truncate in blurred overlay

imageSrc.note: Image path for team member photo (full-bleed with rounded-theme-capped)

videoSrc.note: Video path for team member (alternative to imageSrc)

imageAlt.note: Alt text for image (defaults to member name if not provided)

videoAriaLabel.note: Aria label for video (defaults to member name if not provided)

propsSchema.members: Array<{ id: string, name: string, role: string, imageSrc?: string, videoSrc?: string, imageAlt?: string, videoAriaLabel?: string }>
propsSchema.gridVariant: 'uniform-all-items-equal' | 'bento-grid' | 'bento-grid-inverted' | 'asymmetric-60-wide-40-narrow' | 'three-columns-all-equal-width' | 'one-large-right-three-stacked-left' | 'items-top-row-full-width-bottom' | 'full-width-top-items-bottom-row' | 'one-large-left-three-stacked-right' (required - determines grid layout or carousel trigger)
propsSchema.title: string
propsSchema.titleSegments?: Array<{ type: 'text', content: string } | { type: 'image', src: string, alt?: string }> - For inline images in title
propsSchema.buttons?: Array<{text: string, onClick?: () => void, href?: string}>
propsSchema.textboxLayout: 'default' | 'split' | 'split-actions' | 'split-description' | 'inline-image' (required - 'inline-image' uses titleSegments for rich text with images)
propsSchema.textBoxTitleImageWrapperClassName?: string - For styling image wrapper in inline-image layout
propsSchema.textBoxTitleImageClassName?: string - For styling images in inline-image layout

usageExample: <TeamCardSix members={[{ id: '1', name: 'Sarah Johnson', role: 'CEO & Founder', imageSrc: '/team/sarah.jpg' }, { id: '2', name: 'Michael Chen', role: 'CTO', imageSrc: '/team/michael.jpg' }]} gridVariant="uniform-all-items-equal" animationType="slide-up" title="Meet Our Team" description="The talented people behind our success" textboxLayout="default" useInvertedBackground={false} tag="Team" tagIcon={Users} />
